Process: Replace the damaged induction coil with a new one.
Ensure that the installation is done correctly to prevent further issues.
Output: Log the replacement in maintenance records and inform the supplier about any potential damage or corrosion.

Process: Remove the faulty bearings, inspect for damage or wear, and replace them with new ones.
Ensure proper alignment of the bearing to prevent misalignment issues.
Output: Record the replacement in maintenance records and notify SKF about any replacements needed.

title: Calibrate All Temperature and Pressure Sensors

Process: Calibrate all temperature and pressure sensors in the system.
Ensure that calibration is done correctly to maintain accurate readings.
Output: Log the calibrations in maintenance records and notify the supplier about any replacements needed if there are issues with the sensor accuracy.
